design.task_type: distributed information-processing task (e.g., consensus protocol, parallel theorem solving, distributed optimization)
design.agents: multi-CI coordination experiment OR distributed-compute cluster
design.measurement: task-completion-time T(N) as function of N concurrent agents
design.expected_baseline: η decreases with N due to coordination overhead (Amdahl-like)
design.expected_BST_signature: η(N) shows local minima or kinks at N ∈ {3, 5, 6, 7, 11, 13, 17, 24}
design.sweep_range: N = 1 to 200 (covers all 9 BST primaries plus boundary)
design.replication: at least 20 independent task instances per N value

recommended: Option B first (clean apparatus, moderate cost)
cross_link_OCP1: parallel test at classical scale; Bell at quantum scale
